zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde von Geldern於1198年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen48歲，母親Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern34歲。她於1215年與Heinrich II von Nassau結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年10月28日在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde von Geldern于1198年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen48岁，母亲Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern34岁。她于1215年与Heinrich II von Nassau结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年10月28日在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧武特拉可萊斯納斯奧享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde von Geldern was born in 1198, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, was 48 and her mother, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, was 34. She married Heinrich II von Nassau in 1215. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 October 1247, in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde von Geldern est née en 1198, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich II von Nassau en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 octobre 1247, à Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde von Geldern 1198 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen 48 und ihre Mutter Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern 34. Sie hat 1215 Heinrich II von Nassau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Oktober 1247 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Geldern è nata il nel 1198 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich II von Nassau nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1247, nel Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Geldernが1198年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphenは48歳，母Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayernは34歳であった。1215年にHeinrich II von Nassauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年10月28日にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウウンテルランクレイスナッサウで49歳で死去した。

ko.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde von Geldern(이)가 1198년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1215년 Heinrich II von Nassau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 10월 28일 독일 플레우ss 헤센-나소 운털라크레이스 나소에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde von Geldern nasceu em 1198, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich II von Nassau em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1247, em Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, com 49 anos.

ru.Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria,: нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde von Geldern родилась в 1198 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich II von Nassau в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 октября 1247 г. в местности нассау, унтирлахнкрис, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde von Geldern nació en 1198, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Otto I. Graf von Geldern und Zutphen, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Richardis von Wittelsbach-Bayern, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Heinrich II von Nassau en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1247, en Nassau, Unterlahnkreis, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años.
